Celiac Disease Screening

Celiac Disease Screening 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a celiac disease screening? 
A celiac disease screening is a blood test that looks for signs that you may have celiac disease , an autoimmune disorder that causes a serious allergic reaction to gluten. Gluten is a protein found in wheat, barley, rye and other grains. It may also be found in other products like vitamins and supplements , hair and
